hero.headline: The AI Executive Assistant for modern organizations.
hero.sub: ARIA helps professionals, leaders, organizations, and public institutions work faster — from meetings to institutional knowledge.
problem.heading: Why We Built ARIA
problem.p1.label: The Problem
problem.p1.title: Fragmentation & Administrative Burden
problem.p1.desc: Critical information is scattered across emails, disjointed documents, and unrecorded meetings. Staff spend valuable time on repetitive routine tasks.
problem.p2.label: The Impact
problem.p2.title: Slower Public Service Delivery
problem.p2.desc: Loss of institutional context leads to slow, inconsistent decision-making that relies heavily on individual memory.
problem.p3.label: The ARIA Solution
problem.p3.title: Centralized Executive Intelligence
problem.p3.desc: ARIA integrates automated workflows into daily operations—capturing, structuring, and securing information without adding to the workload.

workflow.title: From meeting to decision — automatically.
workflow.sub: ARIA connects every step of executive work into one seamless flow — with no manual effort.
workflow.step1.title: Meeting
workflow.step2.title: AI Analysis
workflow.step2.desc: ARIA captures and analyzes the discussion in real time.
workflow.step3.title: Minutes
workflow.step3.desc: Decisions and action items are structured automatically.
workflow.step4.title: Google Docs

workflow.step5.desc: Executives review, approve, and everything is tracked.

features.label: Key Features
features.title: What ARIA does
features.meeting.title: Meeting Intelligence
features.meeting.desc: Automatically captures, structures, and distributes meeting outcomes — decisions, action items, and key points — without manual effort.
features.knowledge.title: Knowledge Management
features.knowledge.desc: Organizes institutional knowledge into searchable, accessible formats so information is available when and where it is needed.
features.document.title: Document Automation
features.document.desc: Generates, processes, and formats documents using AI-assisted workflows, reducing turnaround time for routine outputs.
features.workspace.title: AI Workspace
features.workspace.desc: A unified interface for AI-assisted tasks across your organization — consistent, context-aware, and accessible to every team member.

footer.statement: AI-native products for professionals, leaders, organizations, and public institutions.
aria.desc: ARIA listens, structures, and organizes information securely—allowing your team to focus on the work that matters rather than paperwork.
aria.problem.label: The Problem
aria.problem.title: Friction and Fragmentation
aria.problem.desc: Critical information remains scattered across emails, disjointed documents, and unrecorded meetings. This results in repetitive administrative work and siloed institutional knowledge.
aria.solution.label: The Solution
aria.solution.title: Structured Intelligence
aria.solution.desc: By integrating directly into your daily operations, ARIA acts as an intelligent assistant that structures data at the source, creating a unified, searchable, and actionable organizational memory.
aria.cap.label: Capabilities
aria.cap.title: How ARIA Works
aria.cap.meeting.title: Meeting Intelligence
aria.cap.meeting.desc: Automatically organize meetings into structured notes, decisions, and tracked action items without manual intervention.
aria.cap.document.title: Document Automation
aria.cap.document.desc: Accelerate administrative document creation using AI-assisted workflows powered by your organization's context.
aria.cap.knowledge.title: Knowledge Management
aria.cap.knowledge.desc: Build a dynamic institutional knowledge base that remains searchable, contextual, and reusable across departments.
aria.cap.workspace.title: AI Workspace
aria.cap.workspace.desc: A centralized, secure interface for all AI-assisted tasks, ensuring consistent output and strict data privacy compliance.
aria.arch.label: Architecture
aria.arch.title: Enterprise Grade Security
aria.arch.p: ARIA is built on an isolated data architecture designed specifically for the public sector. Your organizational data never trains public models.
aria.arch.li2.text: Comprehensive tracking of all AI interactions.
aria.arch.li3.text: Tracing generated outputs back to source documents.

aria.dash.title: Executive Dashboard
aria.dash.desc: Everything that matters today — meetings, tasks, and knowledge — in one calm view.
aria.gov.title: From an official meeting to a formal decision.
aria.gov.sub: ARIA follows the real government workflow — turning meetings into minutes, documents, and tracked approvals.

aria.uc.2.title: Knowledge Management
aria.uc.2.desc: Institutional policies and decisions, searchable at any time.
aria.uc.3.title: Document Automation
aria.uc.3.desc: Draft administrative documents from your organization's context.
aria.uc.4.title: Decision Tracking
aria.uc.4.desc: Every executive decision recorded and auditable.

about.label: Company
about.desc: Technology should simplify work, not make it more complicated. We build AI-native products that help organizations manage knowledge, streamline workflows, and accelerate public service delivery.
about.mission.title: Mission
about.mission.desc: To reduce repetitive administrative work through practical, transparent, and highly adoptable AI solutions.
about.vision.title: Vision
about.vision.desc: To become the trusted AI partner for the Indonesian public sector, transforming government workflows into efficient, knowledge-driven operations.
about.philosophy.label: Philosophy
about.philosophy.title: The AI-Native Approach
about.philosophy.p1: We do not treat AI as a decorative feature or an afterthought. At kat.on, AI is the foundational layer of our product architecture.
about.philosophy.p2: Our philosophy, governed by the KATON COMMAND CENTER, mandates that the best solution is the one that reduces future complexity. We prioritize maintainability, simplicity, scalability, and relentless documentation.
about.philosophy.p3: We believe in Human-First AI: technology that assists rather than replaces, providing explainable and secure augmentation for knowledge workers.
about.timeline.label: Timeline
about.timeline.title: Our Journey
about.tl.m1: Accelerated development sprint validating our core AI concepts.
about.tl.m2: Established the centralized intelligence hub for internal operations.
about.tl.m3: Development of the flagship AI Executive Assistant begins.
about.tl.m4: Official launch of the AI-Native Product Studio for the public sector.
projects.label: Ecosystem
projects.desc: Our ecosystem is designed around solving specific government and administrative challenges through AI, automation, and strict knowledge management.
meta.about.title: About kat.on | AI-Native Product Studio
meta.about.desc: kat.on is an AI-Native Product Studio dedicated to simplifying public sector workflows through human-centered artificial intelligence.
meta.projects.title: Product Ecosystem | kat.on
meta.projects.desc: Explore the kat.on product ecosystem, featuring our flagship AI Executive Assistant ARIA, and our internal knowledge platforms.
